channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nakuru Woman Faces Heartbreak After Building Mother’s House, Denied Entry
item.description: Naomi Mugure, a 27-year-old woman from Nakuru, is facing a very tough time despite her hard work abroad. She went to Qatar to work as a domestic helper and later as a security personnel, earning enoug...

item.title: Collection of Political and Social Cartoons, 16 March 2026
item.description: This gallery features a selection of cartoons published on 16 March 2026, highlighting political and social commentary relevant to current federal issues. The collection includes four distinct images ...

item.title: Toronto transit agencies debate plastic versus fabric seats for buses and light rail
item.description: Toronto’s transit seats, whether on buses, streetcars, or subways, have sparked a conversation about hygiene, comfort, and design. The TTC is gradually switching from fabric to plastic seats on its bu...

item.title: Complete Guide to Makerere University Courses, Fees, and Application Process
item.description: Makerere University, established in 1922 in Uganda, is one of Africa's top institutions, producing notable alumni including presidents and prime ministers. The university has ten colleges and multiple...

item.title: Southern Guards gain momentum ahead of LIV Golf’s South African debut at Steyn City
item.description: The Southern Guards are heading into LIV Golf’s South African debut at Steyn City with growing confidence following a solid showing in Singapore, where they finished fifth. While the team had opportun...

item.title: Understanding Adam Smith: The Moral Foundations of Economic Self-Interest
item.description: In this article, Father Raymond J. de Souza explores the moral underpinnings of Adam Smith's economic thought, highlighting the philosopher’s belief that self-interest and benevolence are not mutually...

item.title: Islamabad Airport Flight Operations to Be Temporarily Suspended on March 17
item.description: The Pakistan Airports Authority (PAA) has issued a fresh Notam announcing that flight operations at Islamabad International Airport will be temporarily suspended on March 17. The suspension will last ...

item.title: Tanzania starts local assembly of MGR locomotives, creating jobs and cutting costs
item.description: Tanzania Railways Corporation (TRC) has begun assembling Metre Gauge Railway (MGR) locomotives locally at the Pugu Railway Workshop, becoming the first country in East Africa to do so. The initiative ...

item.title: U.S. Offshore Mining Plans Raise Legal and International Concerns
item.description: The United States is pursuing access to critical minerals essential for modern technology, including nickel, manganese, cobalt, and copper. While these resources are available on U.S. land and within ...

item.title: West Bengal Government Increases Honorarium for Purohits and Muezzins Ahead of Assembly Elections
item.description: On 15th March 2026, West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee announced an increase of ₹500 in the monthly honorarium for purohits and muezzins, Hindu and Muslim religious functionaries, respectively...

item.title: Electric vehicles in Africa could become cost-competitive with petrol cars if financing improves
item.description: The high cost of electric vehicles (EVs) has long been considered a barrier to adoption across Africa, with earlier projections suggesting affordability would only be possible after 2040. However, fal...

item.title: Prince William shares rare family photograph of Diana for Mother's Day
item.description: On Mother's Day, the Prince of Wales shared a previously unseen photograph of his late mother, Diana, Princess of Wales, from the family's private collection. The photograph, taken in 1984 at Highgrov...

item.title: Nigerian Troops Eliminate Senior ISWAP Commander Bako Gorgore In Borno Operation
item.description: Troops from Operation Hadin Kai don chop one big win against Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP) after dem kill one senior commander wey dem dey call Bako Gorgore, also known as Abou Mustapha. ...

item.title: Armed Militants Repelled at Khutti Police Checkpoint in Dera Ismail Khan, Constable Wounded
item.description: DERA ISMAIL KHAN: Late Saturday night, unidentified armed militants attacked the Khutti police checkpoint in Dera Ismail Khan district of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. The attackers, using heavy weapons under t...

item.title: Election dates announced for 5 regions; Rahul Gandhi proposes Bharat Ratna for Kanshi Ram
item.description: The Election Commission of India has officially announced the schedule for the upcoming assembly elections in West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Assam, Kerala, and Puducherry. Polling is set between April 9 and...

item.title: Rwanda Signals Possible Withdrawal of Troops from Cabo Delgado Without Adequate Funding
item.description: Rwanda has indicated that it may pull back its troops from Mozambique’s Cabo Delgado province if there is no stable international funding for the mission. The Rwandan deployment started in 2021 at Moz...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs executive Bobby Motaung disputes R4.3m debt claim
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs football manager Bobby Motaung is contesting efforts to have his assets seized over an alleged R4.3 million debt linked to a property and petrol station he purchased more than 15 years a...

item.title: Manchester United and Aston Villa Face Squad Challenges Ahead of Sunday EPL Clash
item.description: Manchester United and Aston Villa are set for a crucial Premier League showdown at Old Trafford on Sunday evening, both teams locked in the battle for Champions League qualification next season. Manch...

item.title: Exploring How Power Operates and Persists in Australian Politics
item.description: Jo Tarnawsky, a former diplomat and chief of staff to Deputy Prime Minister Richard Marles, delves into the mechanisms of power in Australian politics through her latest series. On the 'Cut Through' p...

item.title: Official Lotto Results for March 15, 2026 from PCSO
item.description: ABS-CBN News reported the official lotto results for March 15, 2026. The article serves as a public information update for all Filipinos who participate in the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (P...
